Interface TaskRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
FileTaskRepository, MemoryTaskRepository
public interface TaskRepository
Defines the operations required to store and retrieve tasks. Implementations may use different storage mechanisms, such as files, database or in-memory collections.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Task>
    getTasks()
    Returns all tasks stored in the repository.
    void
    saveTasks(List<Task> tasks)
    Saves all tasks to underlying storage mechanism

  • Method Details

    • getTasks

      List<Task> getTasks()
      Returns all tasks stored in the repository.
      Returns:
      a list containing all stored tasks

    • saveTasks

      void saveTasks(List<Task> tasks)
      Saves all tasks to underlying storage mechanism
